info.title: CruxPass API
info.description: Project-scoped REST API for publishing CruxPass calendar feeds.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

get.description:
Idempotent upsert of an event into this feed, keyed by external_id.

Push `status: "cancelled"` to cancel; sequence bumps on every update so
calendar clients reconcile the change.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

post.description:
Idempotent upsert of an event into this feed, keyed by external_id.

Push `status: "cancelled"` to cancel; sequence bumps on every update so
calendar clients reconcile the change.
Create/update a recurring schedule and materialize its event window.
Create/update an exception for one recurring schedule occurrence.

parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.
